_comment: Zero-dependency config. Copy to config.json and edit. Same fields as config.example.yaml; see references/configuration.md. Stripe is pinned. All other connectors must be Airbyte Agent connectors: https://docs.airbyte.com/ai-agents/connectors
_money_note: dispute_fee_cents, min_amount_cents, and high_value_cents each accept an int in cents (all currencies) OR a per-currency map like {"USD":1500,"EUR":1300,"default":1500}. No FX conversion.

_optional_role_examples._comment: Reference only (ignored at load — the leading underscore keeps it out of 'sources'). To enable an optional role, copy one of these into 'sources' above, replacing its null.

service_usage._comment: Proves the customer used the service; feeds Stripe access_activity_log. Agent connectors: amplitude (event-level usage) or orb (usage-based billing: subscriptions/invoices, entity e.g. 'subscriptions', match_field 'external_customer_id').

order_data._comment: E-commerce orders: line items, shipping/fulfillment, tracking, customer-provided address. Feeds shipping_*/product_description/receipt. Agent connectors: shopify | woocommerce | amazon-seller-partner. WooCommerce email field is 'billing.email'; Amazon buyer email is often masked, so match by order id.
